chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.1226 of 2024 _______________________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) For orders on M.A. No.2670/2025 For hearing of main case -------------------------------- 12.03.2025 Mr. Qamaruddin Nohri, D.P.G. ----------------------------------------- Applicant and his counsel are called absent. Applicant has filed withdrawal statement on the ground that upon intervention of elders he will not press this application and intends to withdraw this case through statement dated 08.02.2025. Mr. Muhammad Afzal Gudaro, advocate, files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.3, it is taken on record. Since the applicant has filed withdrawal statement, therefore, instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending application(s). J U D G E Gulsher/PS
